name: lumtina

metadata.name: lumtina
metadata.summary: Lumtina is a Python package for various utilities.

documentation:
# Lumtina

A simple and easy python library.

-----------
STATS: 
![PyPI - Downloads](https://img.shields.io/pypi/dm/lumtina)
![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/lumtina)
-----------

## Installation

How to install?

By using pip:

```bash
pip install lumtina
```

# Changelogs:
( for more informations, see the changelogs() function. )

 ### 0.2.6
 [ + ] Added host() function, see functions file for more details.
 [ + ] Modified the README
 [ + ] Modified some functions ( fetch function )
 [ - ] Fixed Bugs

functions.name: lumtina.ascii_converter.ascii
documentation: Converts a string into its ASCII representation.

functions.name: lumtina.console.clear_console
documentation: Clears the console screen.

functions.name: lumtina.url.fetch_urls
documentation: Fetches the content from a list of URLs and returns a dictionary with the URL and its content.

functions.name: lumtina.password_generator.generate_password
documentation: Generates a random password with the specified length.

functions.name: lumtina.network_utils.ping_host
documentation: Pings the specified host and returns the result.

functions.name: lumtina.network_utils.get_ip_info
documentation: Fetches and returns information about the specified IP address.

functions.name: lumtina.network_utils.get_local_ip
documentation: Returns the local IP address of the machine.

functions.name: lumtina.datetime_utils.date
documentation: Restituisce la data corrente in formato 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

functions.name: lumtina.datetime_utils.hour
documentation: Restituisce l'ora corrente in formato 'HH:MM:SS'.

functions.name: lumtina.timer.timer
documentation: Counts down from the specified number of seconds.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.add
documentation: Returns the sum of two numbers.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.subtract
documentation: Returns the difference between two numbers.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.multiply
documentation: Returns the product of two numbers.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.divide
documentation: Returns the quotient of the division between two numbers. Raises an exception if the divisor is zero.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.power
documentation: Returns the result of raising base to the power of exp.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.factorial
documentation: Returns the factorial of a positive integer.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.is_even
documentation: Returns True if the number is even, otherwise False.

functions.name: lumtina.math_update.is_odd
documentation: Returns True if the number is odd, otherwise False.

functions.name: lumtina.browser.browser
documentation: Opens a URL in the default web browser.

functions.name: lumtina.host.host_website
documentation:
Starts a web server to host static files from the specified directory.

Args:
    directory (str): The path to the directory containing the website files. Defaults to the current directory.
    port (int): The port number to run the server on. Default is 8000.
    host (str): The hostname or IP address to bind the server to. Default is "localhost".

Example:
    host_website("C:/path/to/your/website", port=8080, host="0.0.0.0")

functions.name: lumtina.file_handler.read_file
documentation: Reads the content of a file and returns it.

functions.name: lumtina.file_handler.write_file
documentation: Writes the given content to a file.

functions.name: lumtina.file_handler.get_current_directory
documentation: Returns the current working directory.

functions.name: lumtina.file_handler.delete_file
documentation: Deletes the specified file.

functions.name: lumtina.file_handler.copy_file
documentation: Copies a file from source to destination.

functions.name: lumtina.file_handler.move_file
documentation: Moves a file from source to destination.
